strengths: 19 years of proven engineering experience across diverse platforms (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with demonstrated ability to architect and ship products at scale

Strong technical leadership track record: founded GISCollective (open source, production geospatial platform), organized engineering communities (Code Katas, Refactoring Dojos), and created educational workshops reaching engineers across Europe
Exceptional full-stack builder with hands-on fluency across cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), infrastructure, and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No demonstrated machine learning, data science, or AI strategy expertise—background is systems and infrastructure engineering, not AI/ML specialization or published thought leadership in AI

Limited evidence of strategic advisory capability or customer-facing consulting experience; career shows strong implementation focus rather than identifying and influencing adoption of cutting-edge technologies

AI exposure is extremely recent (April 2025: MCP code generators and agentic workflows) with no prior ML products, platforms, or strategy initiatives that validate depth needed for a director-level AI strategy role
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable engineer with 19 years of experience and proven ability to lead technical initiatives, but this role specifically requires a specialist in AI strategy and recognized expertise in adopting/advising on AI technologies. The resume shows recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) but lacks the foundational AI/ML knowledge, demonstrated AI-powered products, or strategic advising experience that would make him competitive for a director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. He would be an exceptional hire for a Staff Engineer or Principal Engineer role in systems/infrastructure, but this position's core mission is AI specialization.
